title: Pet Import Guide: France
description: Complete guide to importing your dog or cat to France. Import requirements, quarantine, breed restrictions, and step-by-step process.
name: France
overview: Importing a pet to France is moderate. Here's what you need to know.

import_requirements.microchip: Required (ISO 11784/11785). Must be implanted before or at same time as rabies vaccination
import_requirements.rabies_titre_test: Required for: Pets from unlisted third countries
import_requirements.import_permit: No formal import permit. EU pet passport or AHC serves as documentation.

sections.heading: Import requirements for France
sections.body:
**Microchip:** Required (ISO 11784/11785). Must be implanted before or at same time as rabies vaccination

**Rabies Vaccination:** Required. 21-day wait after first vaccination

**Rabies Titre Test:** Required for: Pets from unlisted third countries

**Quarantine:** Not required (penalty quarantine if non-compliant)

**Import Permit:** No formal import permit. EU pet passport or AHC serves as documentation.

**Health Certificate:** Required. Valid 10 days.

sections.heading: Breed restrictions in France
sections.body: Governed by: Law 99-5 of 6 January 1999 (amended by Law 2008-582)

sections.heading: Routes to France
sections.body:
We have detailed guides for the following routes:

- [United Kingdom to France](/routes/united-kingdom-to-france/)

faqs.question: What vaccinations does my pet need to enter France?
faqs.answer: At minimum, a rabies vaccination is required. Required. 21-day wait after first vaccination Your pet must also be microchipped before vaccination.

faqs.question: Which airlines fly pets to France?
faqs.answer: Multiple airlines serve pet cargo to France. Check our route-specific guides for airline details on your particular origin-destination pair.
